Complete Icon Asset Family for Dashboard Application

nodes.label: Single-binary Go HTTP server architecture
nodes.rationale: Single-binary design with //go:embed static means no external runtime dependencies — the final binary is fully self-contained.

nodes.label: Data flow: startup → load → in-memory → frontend
nodes.rationale: ensureAtestadosDir → loadAtestados → dadosGlobal protected by sync.RWMutex; POST /api/reload re-reads without restart.
nodes.norm_label: data flow: startup → load → in-memory → frontend

nodes.label: Overlap detection strategy
nodes.rationale: Three types: duplicado_exato (same date+CID), mesmo_dia_cid_diferente (same date, different CID), periodo_sobreposto (date ranges overlap using DataFim = Data + Dias - 1).

nodes.label: Cross-platform build outputs
nodes.rationale: macOS .app bundles use a launcher shell script as CFBundleExecutable to set working directory to bundle parent, ensuring Atestados/ is found in the right place when double-clicked.

nodes.label: Frontend theming design
nodes.rationale: Dark theme default; localStorage persists user choice; SVG chart colors re-render on toggle via renderCharts(); tc(light,dark) helper for theme-aware SVG colors.

nodes.label: Visual Element: Document with Folded Corner
nodes.norm_label: visual element: document with folded corner

nodes.norm_label: visual element: trend line with dots
